Class LobbyTUI

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.TUI.LobbyTUI
public class LobbyTUI extends Object
Handles all lobby-phase interactions. Automatically determines whether to create a new game or join an existing one, based on the server state, without requiring the user to choose.

  • Constructor Details

    • LobbyTUI

      public LobbyTUI(ServerRemoteInterface serverStub, ClientVirtualView clientHandler, Scanner scanner, TUIUtils utils)
      Creates a new LobbyTUI instance.
      Parameters:
      serverStub - the remote server interface.
      clientHandler - the client's virtual view.
      scanner - the shared input scanner.
      utils - the shared TUI utilities.

  • Method Details

    • connect

      public PlayerDTO connect()
      Connects the player to a game. If a game is already in startup phase the player is automatically added to it. If no game is in startup phase the player creates a new one and chooses the number of players. Blocks until the game starts.
      Returns:
      the local PlayerDTO, or null if the thread was interrupted.
